description_long: This is a sealed package of instant noodles, specifically Indomie Mi Goreng, with a crinkled, pillow-like shape. The front of the package features a vibrant image of cooked noodles topped with a sunny-side-up egg, vegetables, and garnishes, along with the Indomie logo and colorful branding. The back of the package displays nutritional information, preparation instructions, and ingredient lists in black text on a white background. The sides of the package are narrow and show the continuation of the branding and some product information. The packaging is made of glossy, flexible plastic, and the contents inside are likely dry, compressed noodles with seasoning sachets. The overall appearance is typical of single-serving snack foods found in urban convenience stores or supermarkets.
description: A crinkled, glossy plastic package of Indomie Mi Goreng instant noodles with colorful branding and a food image on the front, and nutritional information on the back.
description_view_0: Front view showing the Indomie logo, a vivid food image with noodles and egg, and colorful branding.
description_view_1: Side view showing the narrow edge of the package with partial branding and a barcode.
description_view_2: Back view displaying nutritional facts, preparation instructions, and ingredient details in black text.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with more branding and a continuation of the package's crinkled edge.
attribute_brand_logo: The Indomie logo is visible on the front, top left of the package, with a wavy blue and red design and white text.
attribute_flavor_indication: The front image shows noodles with a fried egg and vegetables, and the text 'Mi Goreng' suggests a fried noodle flavor.
attribute_nutritional_labeling: Nutritional information and ingredients are visible on the back of the package in a black and white panel.
